title: TC-SUPPORTED-DEVICES-001: Supported Devices screen loads correctly from Home screen with no headset connected
steps: Launch Poly Studio Mobile app with no headset connected (Bluetooth off or no paired devices)
Verify the Home screen is displayed
Tap the menu icon (hamburger menu) in the top-left corner
Tap 'Supported Devices' from the navigation menu
Verify the Supported Devices screen loads and displays the list of compatible Poly devices
Verify the screen is scrollable and all device categories are visible
Tap the back arrow or close button to return to the Home screen
expected: Supported Devices screen loads fully with all compatible devices listed. Screen is responsive, scrollable, and all UI elements are tappable. Returning to Home screen works without errors.

title: TC-SUPPORTED-DEVICES-002: Rapid close and reopen of Supported Devices screen within 2 seconds — no headset connected
steps: Launch Poly Studio Mobile app with no headset connected
Verify the Home screen is displayed
Tap the menu icon → 'Supported Devices' to open the Supported Devices screen
Immediately (within 1 second) tap the back arrow or close button to return to Home screen
Within 2 seconds of closing, tap the menu icon → 'Supported Devices' again
Attempt to scroll the Supported Devices list
Tap on any device category to expand it
Tap the back arrow to return to Home screen
expected: Supported Devices screen opens and is fully responsive on the second open. All UI elements are tappable, scrolling works, device categories expand on tap, and the back navigation works correctly. No screen freeze, lag, or unresponsiveness occurs.

title: TC-SUPPORTED-DEVICES-003: Triple rapid cycle: Home → Supported Devices → Home → Supported Devices → Home → Supported Devices — no headset connected
steps: Launch Poly Studio Mobile app with no headset connected
From Home screen, tap menu icon → 'Supported Devices'
Immediately tap back arrow to return to Home screen
Within 1 second, tap menu icon → 'Supported Devices' again
Wait 1 second, then tap back arrow to return to Home screen
Within 1 second, tap menu icon → 'Supported Devices' a third time
Verify the screen is fully loaded and responsive
Scroll to the bottom of the device list
Tap the back arrow to return to Home screen
expected: Supported Devices screen remains fully responsive after three rapid open/close cycles. No screen freeze, blank screen, overlapping UI elements, or navigation failures occur. All three cycles complete successfully.

title: TC-SUPPORTED-DEVICES-004: Supported Devices screen rapid open/close while device list is still rendering — no headset connected
steps: Launch Poly Studio Mobile app with no headset connected
Tap menu icon → 'Supported Devices'
Before the device list finishes rendering (within 500ms), tap the back arrow
Immediately (within 1 second) tap menu icon → 'Supported Devices' again
Verify the screen loads completely with all device categories visible
Tap on 'Voyager Free 60+ UC' (or first available device category) to expand
Verify the expanded view shows device details
Collapse the category and return to Home screen
expected: Supported Devices screen recovers gracefully from an interrupted initial load. On the second open, the full device list renders correctly, categories are expandable, and no crash, ANR, or frozen UI occurs.

title: TC-SUPPORTED-DEVICES-005: Supported Devices screen opened immediately after app launch with no headset connected — rapid navigation from splash/onboarding
steps: Clear app data or reinstall Poly Studio Mobile app
Launch the app and complete EULA acceptance and permission grants (if presented)
On the Home screen (no headset connected), immediately tap menu icon → 'Supported Devices'
Verify the Supported Devices screen loads within 3 seconds
Rapidly tap the back arrow twice within 1 second
Verify the app returns to Home screen without crashing or showing a blank screen
Tap menu icon → 'Supported Devices' again
Verify the screen is fully responsive
expected: Supported Devices screen loads successfully even when accessed immediately after app launch. Double-tapping back navigates correctly to Home screen without crash. Subsequent re-entry to Supported Devices works normally.

title: TC-SUPPORTED-DEVICES-006: Supported Devices screen state after rapid close/reopen — verify no UI element overlap or corruption
steps: Launch Poly Studio Mobile app with no headset connected
Open Supported Devices screen via menu icon → 'Supported Devices'
Close and reopen Supported Devices screen 3 times rapidly (within 2 seconds total)
On the 4th open, visually inspect the screen for: text truncation, overlapping elements, missing device names, broken icons, or misaligned layout
Scroll through the entire device list
Verify all device category headers are readable and properly formatted
Return to Home screen
expected: No UI corruption, text truncation, overlapping elements, or layout misalignment after rapid open/close cycles. All device names and category headers render correctly. Screen is visually intact and fully functional.

title: TC-SUPPORTED-DEVICES-007: Supported Devices screen rapid close/reopen while rotating device orientation — no headset connected
steps: Launch Poly Studio Mobile app with no headset connected
Open Supported Devices screen via menu icon → 'Supported Devices'
Rotate device to landscape orientation
Immediately tap back arrow to return to Home screen
Rotate device back to portrait orientation
Within 1 second, tap menu icon → 'Supported Devices' again
Rotate device to landscape while the screen is loading
Verify the Supported Devices screen renders correctly in landscape
Rotate back to portrait and verify the layout adjusts properly
Scroll and interact with the device list
expected: Supported Devices screen handles orientation changes gracefully even during rapid open/close cycles. Layout renders correctly in both portrait and landscape. No screen freeze, blank areas, or layout corruption occurs.

title: TC-SUPPORTED-DEVICES-008: Supported Devices screen rapid close/reopen with app backgrounding — no headset connected
steps: Launch Poly Studio Mobile app with no headset connected
Open Supported Devices screen via menu icon → 'Supported Devices'
Tap the Home button (background the app) while Supported Devices is visible
Immediately reopen the app from the recent apps list
Within 1 second, tap back arrow to return to Home screen
Tap menu icon → 'Supported Devices' again
Verify the screen loads and is responsive
Tap the Home button again to background the app
Wait 5 seconds, then reopen the app from recent apps
Verify the Supported Devices screen (or Home screen if navigated away) is responsive
expected: Supported Devices screen survives app backgrounding during rapid navigation. No crash, ANR, or frozen state when returning from background. Screen remains responsive after multiple background/foreground cycles.
